page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.8xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on the x86_64 architecture, utilizing AMD EPYC processors running at a clock speed of 2.25 GHz. The instance is configured with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced allocation of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring reliance on external block storage volumes for persistent data. Network connectivity is supported by an 8 Gbps baseline bandwidth. There are no integrated graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses bundled with this configuration.

With its dedicated CPU allocation and 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the instance offers predictable compute performance and resource density for general-purpose workloads. It is suitable for applications such as medium-sized databases, enterprise application servers, web serving, and containerized microservices that require stable CPU performance without the need for local storage or hardware acceleration.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.8xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose instance featuring 32 dedicated AMD EPYC CPU cores running at 2.25 GHz. It is equipped with 128.0 GB of RAM, establishing a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-memory ratio of 4.0 GB per core. Operating on the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a baseline network bandwidth of 8 Gbps. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, meaning all storage needs must be met via network-attached block storage. This hardware profile makes the instance well-suited for workloads requiring consistent, dedicated CPU performance, such as enterprise web applications, application servers, and containerized deployments. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable execution times, making it a reliable choice for multi-threaded processing tasks that do not require specialized hardware accelerators.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2a-c1m4.8xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC cores, 128 GB RAM, and 8 Gbps network bandwidth, optimized for enterprise applications and web serving.

tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core AMD EPYC instance with a balanced memory ratio for predictable general-purpose enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC physical cores running at 2.25 GHz
128.0 GB of system memory with a balanced 1:4 resource ratio
8 Gbps baseline network bandwidth for standard data transfer
No local storage or integrated GPU accelerators included
Suitable for enterprise web serving, application servers, and containerized workloads
